description: Pi Agent now shares the `.agents/skills/` skill root with Codex/Gemini CLI instead of keeping a private `.pi/skills/` copy, fixing duplicate/conflicting skill installs when a project has both platforms enabled.

migrations.description: Pi Agent: move installed skills from the private `.pi/skills/` root to the shared `.agents/skills/` root also used by Codex and Gemini CLI.
migrations.reason: Pi already discovers `.agents/skills/` natively, so keeping a separate `.pi/skills/` copy of the same Trellis skills caused Pi to see the same skill twice (once from each root) when Codex or Gemini was also installed (#447).
